bead.title: Create website/content/docs/concepts/software-factory.md explaining the metaphor
bead.description: Create website/content/docs/concepts/software-factory.md explaining: what 'software factory' means, what DDx inherits from the 2000s Microsoft tradition (Greenfield/Short), what the 2026 spec-driven movement adds (spec-kit, Kiro), what DDx specifically adds (bounded contexts, evidence on disk, project-local install), what DDx intentionally does not do (methodology lock-in). Cross-link to REF-007, REF-005, REF-006.
bead.acceptance: 1. concepts/software-factory.md exists. 2. Contains sections: definition, lineage, what DDx inherits, what DDx adds, what DDx avoids. 3. Cross-links to relevant REF artifacts. 4. cd website && hugo builds successfully.
